pass1_value.note: Project API keys (anon and service_role) are available in the dashboard Project Settings → API; the Pricing page confirms Free tier projects exist, implying developers can obtain keys on a free tier without human approval.

final_value.note: Supabase documents that API keys (including the anon key and the service role key) can be found in the Supabase Dashboard under Project Settings → API, indicating credentials are self-serve retrievable from the dashboard.
